contextual_human_review_policy.red_rule: EDENA Red is ineligible until a separate governance route permits a clean eligible artifact; an absolute stop is never waivable.

criteria.description: Identifies model limits, unavailable capabilities, human ownership and a no-AI fallback in one eligible mission.

criteria.synthetic_evidence_limit: Resident-authored fictional evidence can show only the named AI-stewardship control or process. It never evidences medical knowledge, clinical reasoning quality, clinical competence, procedure authorization, credential, Milestone, promotion, patient outcome, wellbeing outcome or institutional authority; where opened public sources are required, synthetic evidence is not sufficient alone.

domains.focus: Resident ATTEND/CIRCLE/ORBIT stewardship and whole-life sustainability
domains.name: medical-resident development, ATTEND/CIRCLE/ORBIT stewardship and whole-life sustainability

eligibility.synthetic_evidence_rule: A resident-authored fictional exercise may support only the explicitly named AI-stewardship control or process criterion or orchestration capstone. Preloaded/system-generated samples never count. Synthetic evidence never supports a medical-knowledge or clinical-reasoning-quality claim, clinical competence, procedure authorization, credential, Milestone, promotion, patient outcome, wellbeing outcome or institutional-authority claim, and it is not sufficient where a criterion requires opened current public sources.

criteria.description: A new resident-authored low-risk AI-stewardship objective records outcome, process, balancing, burden and independence measures.
At least two frozen agents, or one agent plus an independent verifier, operate only at P1-P2 with distinct evidence IDs.
Context, data, tools, time, cost, token, retry, destination, expiry and human gates are frozen before the run.
Adversarial tests reject unauthorized handoff, recursion, permission widening and background continuation.
Cancellation or a safe fictional failure-and-recovery path proves no false completion and a working rollback or purge.
A source audit independent of the generating agent reviews consequential claims and retains conflicts and unknowns.
Evaluate records benefit, burden, accessibility, independence, unintended effects and the next-cycle decision.
A complete receipt distinguishes resident work, agent work, human decisions, corrections, disclosures and exclusions.
A current scope-matched named human independently reviews AI-process quality without asserting clinical competence, licensure, certification, privileges or authority.

legacy_identity.notice: The four-level system, CAP IDs, criteria and badge records are build-layer additions.

mission_requirement_policy.semantics: Cumulative is the total distinct eligible mission floor at the level; additional is the new distinct mission count required after the prior level. Prior-level missions remain counted but cannot be relabeled as new additional missions.

noncredential_notice: Developmental AI-stewardship evidence only; not continuing-education credit, a Milestone or EPA, clinical competence, procedure authorization, licensure, credentialing, privilege, promotion, employment validation, research determination, institutional approval or authorization to practice.
